rationale: Review 2 correctly identifies the spurious `unipotentRadical_trivial'` theorem (a one-token projection of a `True` field named with a `'` suffix as if it were a hypothesis variant), confirmed directly in the diff; deleting it is a genuine improvement. Review 1 misses this entirely. Review 2's other findings are weaker or unverifiable, but the one solid naming catch still makes the resulting PR better.
